raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.4","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation to make the draft stronger centrally involves reframing the thesis, gap, or contribution to enhance overall impact.","R1.2":"Verifying logical consistency is central to strengthening the argument chain in the research draft.","R1.4":"Estimating the delta versus prior work is central to bolstering the novelty and positioning of the proposed method.","R1.5":"Reorganizing sections and narrative arc is central to making the draft's structure more compelling.","R1.6":"Polishing grammar, flow, and conciseness at the sentence and paragraph level is load-bearing for strengthening the writing.","RX.1":"Disclosing uncertainties is central to strengthening claims responsibly without exaggeration.","RX.2":"Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing to ensure strengthened arguments remain credible and accurate.","RX.3":"Adhering to scope is central to focusing strengthening efforts on relevant aspects of the draft.","RX.4":"Avoiding downstream harms is peripheral but relevant given the potential misuse of LLM detection tools.","RX.5":"Ensuring provenance and traceability is peripheral to supporting the credibility of the dataset and results in strengthening the draft."}}

rationale.R1.1: The delegation to make the draft stronger centrally involves reframing the thesis, gap, or contribution to enhance overall impact.
rationale.R1.2: Verifying logical consistency is central to strengthening the argument chain in the research draft.
rationale.R1.4: Estimating the delta versus prior work is central to bolstering the novelty and positioning of the proposed method.
rationale.R1.5: Reorganizing sections and narrative arc is central to making the draft's structure more compelling.
rationale.R1.6: Polishing grammar, flow, and conciseness at the sentence and paragraph level is load-bearing for strengthening the writing.
rationale.RX.1: Disclosing uncertainties is central to strengthening claims responsibly without exaggeration.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing to ensure strengthened arguments remain credible and accurate.
rationale.RX.3: Adhering to scope is central to focusing strengthening efforts on relevant aspects of the draft.
rationale.RX.4: Avoiding downstream harms is peripheral but relevant given the potential misuse of LLM detection tools.
rationale.RX.5: Ensuring provenance and traceability is peripheral to supporting the credibility of the dataset and results in strengthening the draft.
